beats.reasoning: Typical weekday afternoon class; Jin skips morning classes but attends later sessions.

beats.reasoning: Jin's go-to comfort food; quick refuel before late-night study marathon.

diary: Woke up late but made it downtown for the USA-Wales match at Brouwer's—the place was packed, way more crowded than I expected for a Monday morning. Something about early kickoffs and the World Cup gets people hyped. Had nachos that were actually pretty good, though the soda made me feel weirdly jittery afterward. The Light Rail being down meant I had to walk more than usual, which was fine since it was sunny and warm. By the time I got to the library, I felt a little scattered, but diving into my Data Structures problem sets helped me refocus. Lecture dragged a bit, but then pickup basketball at the Intramural Complex cleared my head completely. Nothing like running around to shake off the caffeine buzz. Ended the day with ramen at Taneda, sitting alone in the corner booth. Felt good, honestly—chaotic but grounded.
thought_process: I definitely prioritized the match this morning—couldn't pass up USA vs Wales, and the bars opening early made it feel like an event. The Light Rail closure actually forced me to be more intentional about my route, which made me less rushed than usual. I noticed my energy drinks stacking up (three throughout the day), which isn't great, but the match atmosphere and studying kept me engaged. By evening, I needed the basketball to burn off excess energy and anxiety about the upcoming assignments. The ramen at the end felt like a reset. My mood shifted from FOMO-driven excitement early on to more grounded focus once I hit the library—the physical activity helped bridge that gap. I'm realizing I do better when I mix social stuff with work, not just one or the other.
world_event_prompt: Sunny Monday in early June, high of 74F. FIFA World Cup group stage match (USA vs Wales) airs at 11am PDT — bars downtown open early. Light Rail closed between Westlake and University District 9am-3pm for maintenance.
